entries.name: organization-reconcile-defaults
entries.purpose: Nightly 03:15 UTC: sweep every tenant for the is_default=true invariant. Zero → promote oldest active row; multiple → keep oldest, demote rest. Emits `stackra.organization.default_invariant.violations` counter.

entries.name: organization-purge-archived
entries.purpose: Nightly 03:45 UTC (after reconciliation): hard-delete archived Organizations past the 730-day hold IF no descendants + no branch references remain.

entries.name: organization-slot-usage-warm
entries.purpose: Weekly Sunday 04:00 UTC: recompute the organization_slot usage from source-of-truth for every tenant. Drift detected here indicates an entitlement observer bug — non-zero drift fires a compliance-critical alert.

entries.name: organization-tree-path-consistency-probe
entries.purpose: Nightly 02:30 UTC: dry-run the tree-path rebuild against a 1% sample of rows. Any drift emits `stackra.organization.tree_path_drift.count` non-zero + fires the readiness probe failure.
